description: SMTP2GO is an email delivery service that lets customers send email and SMS, manage senders and account settings, and view delivery activity and statistics. It also provides SMTP relay infrastructure and tooling for integrating those capabilities into applications.
summary: SMTP2GO exposes a REST/JSON API, a remote Streamable HTTP MCP server, and SMTP relay access; the API and MCP use SMTP2GO API keys, while SMTP relay uses SMTP user credentials.
